questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #14 replaces the old log_rate_limit first-N limiter with LogSampler, three ratio rates, request/access/diagnostic sampling classes, RPC propagation via LogSampleConfigPb/log_sample_state, and access hot-path pre-drop behavior.
